zh.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway於1226年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克。她和Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1300年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway于1226年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克。她和Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1300年在苏格兰音巴內-爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maclachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLaughlin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Siobhan, Aileen, Caitlin, Keane, Liam, Padric, Aine, Ciaran, Conan, Conley.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lochlainn ‘son of the Norseman’, from the personal name Lochlann ‘stranger, Norseman’, from a term denoting Scandinavia (possibly ‘land of lakes/fjords’). This was a ruling family in Ulster. See also Laughlin and compare the Scottish form McLachlan .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway was born in 1226, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. She died in 1300, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway est née en 1226, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway wurde 1226 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway è nata il nel 1226 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. Morì nel 1300, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Gallowayは1226年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた。彼女はSir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Gallowayとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1300年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway(은)는 1226년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway nasceu em 1226, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway родилась в 1226 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway nació en 1226, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway. Murió en 1300, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años.
